stem:
4(mx + 9) = (35/12)x + 27

In the given equation, m is a constant. The equation has no solution. What is the value of m?
rationale: Distribute on the left: 4mx + 36 = (35/12)x + 27. A linear equation has no solution precisely when the coefficients of x are equal but the constants differ. Setting 4m = 35/12 gives m = 35/48. The constants 36 and 27 are unequal, so no solution exists.
